title: erythroxylum banaoense
intro: Erythroxylum banaoense is a plant species in the Erythroxylum genus, commonly referred to as a type of coca plant native to the Andes. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea, as well as its potential to treat altitude sickness. The health benefits of Erythroxylum banaoense include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, joint pain, and respiratory issues. Erythroxylum banaoense is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some traditional medicine practices, it is also used in tinctures or powdered form for its medicinal properties.
